chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ النِّعْمَةَ الَّتِي ذَكَرَهَا اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي كِتَابِهِ الْأَئِمَّةُ ( عليهم السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 27 – The Favour (النِّعْمَةَ) which Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Mentioned in His<sup>azwj</sup> Book, are the Imams<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (447/ 2)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (447/ 2)
text: اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فَبِأَيِّ آلاءِ رَبِّكُما تُكَذِّبانِ أَ بِالنَّبِيِّ أَمْ بِالْوَصِيِّ تُكَذِّبَانِ نَزَلَتْ فِي الرَّحْمَنِ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad raising,

(Heasws said): ‘With regards to the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [55:13] Which then of the Favours of your Lord will you two deny? Is it with the Prophetsaww or with the successorasws will you two deny?’ It was Revealed in (Surah) Al-Rahman.
en.sarwar: 2. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla ibn Muhammad, in a mafu‘ manner, (rafa’ahu) about the words of Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High. “(Jinn and mankind) - which of the favors of your Lord do you deny?” [55:13] Will you deny and refuse the Holy Prophet or his successor.” (This verse has come down in Ch 55 al-Rahman.)
